fields.description:
## Context / Problem
At current origin/main commit 0f5dbc88b, the pinned Ruff 0.15.19 command `ruff check --select RUF --ignore RUF001,RUF002,RUF003,RUF100 --statistics src/rebar tests` reports 142 actionable diagnostics: 49 RUF059, 36 RUF022, 18 RUF005, 18 RUF012, 10 RUF043, 6 RUF023, 2 RUF028, and one each of RUF019, RUF046, and RUF102. The same narrow RUF census without ignoring RUF100 reports an additional 771 RUF100 diagnostics; those are narrow-selection artifacts because the currently valid `noqa` codes are outside that command's selected rules. They are not counted as remediation debt.

This story clears the 142 non-ambiguous RUF diagnostics before selecting the family. RUF001, RUF002, and RUF003 remain deferred because many flagged Unicode symbols are intentional prose or UI content. True RUF100 findings are evaluated only with the final full configured rule set after RUF is selected; any suppression that is stale under that full configuration is removed.

## Dependencies and Ownership
This story depends on `28cd-d8f8-4456-482c`. The dependency is both ordering and shared-file ownership: the predecessor lands the ASYNC/DTZ `pyproject.toml` configuration and creates `tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py`; this story then edits the resulting configuration and extends that test. It does not create a competing version of the file.

## Approach
1. Extend `tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py` to require `RUF` in `[tool.ruff.lint].select`.
2. Add `[tool.ruff.lint].ignore = ["RUF001", "RUF002", "RUF003"]` in `pyproject.toml`. The global deferral lives only in this exact key; do not introduce `extend-ignore` or RUF entries in `per-file-ignores`.
3. In the shared test, assert that the parsed `ignore` value is exactly the three-item deferral set and that `extend-ignore` is absent. Parse `tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores` and assert that no configured code equals `RUF` or starts with `RUF`. This deterministically prohibits broad or code-specific RUF per-file exemptions.
4. Use the pinned Ruff fixer only for safe mechanical edits, review every diff, then manually resolve remaining enabled RUF diagnostics across `src/rebar` and `tests`. The 142-finding census is the starting inventory; the implementation records the post-fix per-code census on the ticket.
5. After RUF is in the global selection, run `ruff check src tests` and remove only RUF100 suppressions that are stale under that full configured rule set. Do not use the narrow-selection 771 count to drive removals.

Ruff security-family expansion and Semgrep expansion remain deferred and are already guarded by the predecessor's shared ratchet test; this story does not duplicate those orthogonal acceptance criteria.

Rejected: RUF per-file ignores, `extend-ignore`, Ruff S-family expansion, Semgrep expansion, and treating narrow-selection RUF100 output as actionable debt.

## Scope
- `pyproject.toml`
- `tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py` (extend the file landed by 28cd)
- source and test files among the 142 diagnostics reported by the baseline command, limited to safe mechanical or behavior-preserving changes

## Testing / Verification
- Baseline reproduction: `ruff check --select RUF --ignore RUF001,RUF002,RUF003,RUF100 --statistics src/rebar tests`
- Configuration and deferrals: `pytest -q tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py`
- Enabled RUF diagnostics: `ruff check --select RUF --ignore RUF001,RUF002,RUF003,RUF100 src/rebar tests`
- Full configured rule set including authoritative RUF100 evaluation: `ruff check src tests`
- Canonical lint: `make lint`
- Default tier: `pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] The implementation begins from the empirically measured 142-diagnostic inventory in Context and changes only files reported by that census.
- [ ] `tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py` asserts `[tool.ruff.lint].select` contains the exact selector `RUF`.
- [ ] `tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py` asserts `[tool.ruff.lint].ignore` is exactly `RUF001`, `RUF002`, and `RUF003`.
- [ ] `tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py` asserts `[tool.ruff.lint]` has no `extend-ignore` key.
- [ ] `ruff check --select RUF --ignore RUF001,RUF002,RUF003,RUF100 src/rebar tests` exits 0.
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` exits 0, proving RUF100 reports no stale `noqa` under the final full configured rule set.
- [ ] `tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py` iterates every `tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores` code and fails if the code equals `RUF` or starts with `RUF`.
- [ ] [operator-attested] The implementation records the post-remediation per-code RUF census on this ticket, including the authoritative RUF100 result from `ruff check src tests`.
- [ ] `make lint` exits 0.
- [ ] `pytest -m "not integration and not external" -q` exits 0.
